title: The Route to Big Mom’s Territory
description: On pages 14–17, this part focuses on Sanji, Unknown person #13, Reiju, Unknown person #14, Luffy, Unknown person #15 as The rescue team reaches Big Mom’s territory and learns how Sanji is trapped by family and political pressure.
scene: The Sanji retrieval team enters Big Mom’s sphere of influence, where every friendly face may be connected to the wedding trap.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: So that's straw hat luffy...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: You have my most sincere thanks for...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: taking care of my little brother for all this time.()

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Whooaaa! So then you must be Sanji's older sister!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Indeed. Sanji left us at a very young age, and ever since then, my father has been searching for him.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Two years ago, a wanted poster featuring a portrait some- what resembling him began to circulate...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: father sent the Marine HQ after him, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It seems the man in the portrait was a different person named Duval.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ahh... that duval incident... even Sanji was quite peeved over the mixup.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Recently, what with the activities of the newly revived straw hat pirates,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We finally received word from the government that they had finally man- aged to capture an accurate picture...

dialogue.speaker: Reiju
dialogue.text: of black leg Sanji...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: immediately, father raised his bounty, and changed the bounty con-itions...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: From "dead or alive"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: to "only alive."

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So that's why Sanji's poster stuck out like a sore thumb...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Where is he?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I cannot say... perhaps he is with big mom... or my father.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We came out to meet him but it appears we lost our way. :)

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Sanji's Sister!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Thank you for saving me.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But we want you to give us Sanji back!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: He's my friend!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: See what you've done...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You've gone and saved the life of our enemy.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And you! You're pekoms, from big mom's crew, no?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why are you loitering around with the straw hats?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: I've got my own reasons, kid!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And I don't feel like Tellin' you 'em!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Gaoh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: We still ain't...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Tied together yet!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Point well taken!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: For now,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I think we'll pretend we never saw anything here.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yeah. If we make a scene here, our brother's marriage...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: will get called off. We would both do well to tread carefully from here on out.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Good idea!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: fare- Well.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Luck be with you...)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Yes.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm positive ...straw hat luffy is on board.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: ...ch. B26 / end

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: What are your orders,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Jinbe?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: An unexpected persona shows up in the plan to save Sanji?!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Approach storyline with 46 dialogue beats. The crew moves from Zou toward Big Mom’s territory and begins to understand the scale of Sanji’s predicament.
